section.heading: Withholding
section.chapeau: Whenever the Administrator, after giving reasonable notice and opportunity for hearing to a recipient of financial assistance under this subchapter, finds that—

paragraph.content: the program or activity for which the grant or contract involved was made has been so changed that it no longer complies with this subchapter; or
in the operation of such program or activity there is failure to comply substantially with any provision of this subchapter;

section.continuation: the Administrator shall initiate such proceedings as are appropriate.
section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 93–415, title II, § 299B, formerly § 293, as added Pub. L. 100–690, title VII, § 7266(4), Nov. 18, 1988, 102 Stat. 4449; renumbered § 299B, Pub. L. 102–586, § 2(i)(1)(B), Nov. 4, 1992, 106 Stat. 5006.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 5673 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Oct. 1, 1988, see section 7296(a) of Pub. L. 100–690, set out as an Effective Date of 1988 Amendment note under section 11101 of this title.
